name: Aria Pokoteng
description: Amongst the undine companies, it's a tradition to keep a blue-eyed cat (breed is not a problem here) as mascot for good luck. President Aria is the Aria Company's mascot, a male Aqua breed feline (common trait are bigger than Earth breed and human-level intelligence). He is smart enough to understand human speech. President Aria was a stray cat before being taken in by Grandma twenty years ago and has been the company's mascot ever since. He really loves to eat - coupled with Alicia and Akari do

name: Dabao Ji
description: He found [Seven](https://anilist.co/character/147093/Liuqi-Wu) on a beach 2 years ago and saved his life, but because of this, he's now covered in medical bills that he has to pay off. To pay for them all, he attempts to put Seven into all kinds of odd jobs, but eventually pushes him into an assassinating job. Dai Bo gives his invention, the GaiBa Egg, to Seven and instructs him on how to become a killer. He also introduces him to [Xiao Fei](https://anilist.co/character/147099/Xiaofei-Ji) and te

name: Dai Miyamoto
description: Main character. Wants to be the best sax player in the world.

name: Fen Shi
description: The older brother, Shi Fen is a first year at high school. He occasionally gets beaten up by his sister due to his stupid tendencies.

name: Fujin Yuigahama
description: [Yui](https://anilist.co/character/67069)'s mother. She seems to be lenient, kind, friendly person being mostly like Yui herself.

name: Hanbee Kikaku
description: **Height:** 178 cm (5'10.1") He works for the MHK Sales Planning Department and is in charge of developing merchandise. He is a former band member with long hair and many piercings. At first glance, he appears to be emotionally unstable, but he is in fact serious about his work.

name: Kanae
description: A senior in university, a genius guitar player in charge of the faculty’s audio system. Has a rather peculiar part-time job. (Source: Futekiya)

name: Knuckles the Echidna
nativeName: ナックルズ・ザ・エキドゥナ
description: An anthropomorphic echidna and the current guardian of the Master Emerald, a powerful ancient gemstone which is kept on Angel Island. Guarding it is his solemn duty to protect from anyone seeking to abuse it, as well as the sole surviving descendant of the echidna race from the Knuckles Clan. Known for his powerful and wild nature, his dominant traits are his super strength and the two spike-like knuckles on each of his gloves, from which his name is derived from, and which he can dig and climb
searchTerms: ナックルズ・ザ・エキドゥナ

name: Pazu
description: **Age**: 13 Pazu is an orphan who lives alone in a small hut atop a hill in Slag Ravine. While no mention is made of his mother, his father was an avid aviator who, though no one had believed him, had previously discovered and photographed the floating kingdom of Laputa. After his death, Pazu swore that he would find Laputa and prove his father right. Pazu has brown hair and brown eyes. He wears a white shirt and orange vest, blue pants that are patched at the knee, a yellow cap, and brown laced

name: Ren Mihashi
description: __Height:__ 165 cm __Position:__ Pitcher Mihashi, the main character of the series, is a nervous boy with no self confidence. He is shown to have always had this personality, (which seems to come in part from his father, who displays some of the same mannerisms) however, it became much more pronounced in middle school, where he was bullied by his teammates on the baseball team after gaining a place on the team apparently through favouritism, as his grandfather owned the school. The other members

name: Shou
description: Shou is a young boy who befriends Arrietty. In the beginning of the film he moves in with his great aunt because he suffers from a heart condition and needs lots of rest and quiet.

name: Tsubaki Kunoichi
description: __Height:__ 155 cm Tsubaki is the leader of the Dog Squad and the Akane Clan's top student, She is good at ninjutsu in general and has a very serious personality, so the teachers expect a lot of her. However, she loses her composure when it comes to "men" she does not know yet.
mediaTitles: In the Heart of Kunoichi Tsubaki
Kunoichi Tsubaki no Mune no Uchi

name: Tsukune Aono
description: __Height:__ 170 cm He is an average, ordinary human boy who is somehow accepted into a school of monsters and despite the danger it entails for him, he remains on campus, with one of his motivations for staying being Moka Akashiya. Tsukune Aono is a young man who has failed all of his high school entrance exams. With no options left for him, his parents sends him to Yōkai Academy. Upon arriving there however, he soon discovers that it is a special school for monsters and demons alike, and any hu

name: Yakkul
description: [Ashitaka](https://anilist.co/character/2802/Ashitaka)'s loyal red elk.

name: Yaya
description: Yaya is Raishin's puppet who takes the form of a raven-haired teenage girl. She is abnormal in the sense that her appearance and personality strongly resemble that of a human. She adores Raishin and often teases him. Yaya was named for her indestructibility. She is a Banned doll, meaning she is a puppet who has human components. She has real human blood and skin.

name: Yomogi Asanaka
description: He is a first-year student of Fujiyoki High School who took on a part time job at a convenience store to cope with his parents' divorce and his mother getting a boyfriend. He befriended [Gauma](https://anilist.co/character/169410/Gauma) after offering him food and was dragged into becoming one of the co-pilots of Dynazenon, the others being his classmate [Yume Minami](https://anilist.co/character/169411/Yume-Minami) and [Koyomi Yamanaka](https://anilist.co/character/169412/Koyomi-Yamanaka). name: Albert Hawke
description: He is the commander of the Knights of the Third Order. He is nicknamed the "Ice Knight" for his frigid demeanor. He became an ally of Sei Takanashi after she saved him from a mortal wound. ~!He proposed to Sei and is currently engaged to her.!~

name: Bell Hydra
description: __Height:__ 163 cm A sorceress of the highest quality, she meets up with Yanagi and Staz after they use her gateway connecting Hell and Earth after it was stolen from her. She has expressed interest both in unsealing Staz's powers and it is hinted that she has a crush on him. A naturally outgoing and goofy person, she is rarely seen without her giant backpack.

name: Doppo Orochi
description: A karate master and head of the shinshinkai-kan.One of the only people in the world able to stand toe-to-toe with Yujiro. He whips his students into shape by fighting them regularly, and practices all of his karate techniques at least one thousand times daily. A very devoted karate practitioner, and a mentor of Baki's. Also the instructor of Katou and father of Katsumi. He fought Yujiro, who gouged his eye out and killed him. However, Doppo was revived by Kureha. He eventually fights the escaped
mediaTitles: Baki: The Great Raitai Tournament Saga

name: Gamabunta
description: Gamabunta speaks like a yakuza gangster who won't work with anyone he doesn't respect. Despite this, he is fiercely protective of his children and Naruto, and will fight for their safety regardless of his respect for the summoner (or, more likely, whether or not Jiraiya is on his good side).

name: Hitomi Uzaki
description: Hitomi starts as one of the protagonists of the Killing Bites manga, becoming a potential antagonist and rival of her co-protagonist (Nomoto Yuuya) later on. After a rather fateful meeting with Nomoto, she becomes a temporary ally with the Ishida Zaibatsu, one of the four major business conglomerates which handle all the affairs in regards to the hybrids. She's an integral part of Shidou Reiichi's mysterious agenda. ~!She is also one of the few confirmed Origin Beasts, which means she is a natur

name: Iris Belzerg
nativeName: ベルゼルグ・スタイリッシュ・ソード・アイリス
description: Iris has a little-sister type personality but also acts very kind and cheerful, almost always seen with a smile on her face. As a princess, she is very polite and treats everyone with respect. Iris always restrains herself, and acts like a model royalty, is obedient and won’t give trouble to others.

name: Jail Murdoch
description: He is a part of the Althea Royal Guard army, having the rank of squad leader with the title of Lieutenant. His "Count" is 900. ~!Jail maintains his true count hidden so as not to be promoted to a higher rank, so that he can continue with field missions. His original count is 12500, later decreasing to 12498, due to the events of the series. Later, the possession of his second glove is revealed, containing the count of 45,000, thus showing how great his conviction is.!~

name: Johannes Krauser II
nativeName: ヨハネ・クラウザーII世
description: The main protagonist. A calm and peaceful musician, fan of Swedish pop who is the exact opposite of his alter-ego Johannes Krauser II, leader of the "extreme" metal band DMC (short for Detroit Metal City). Ashamed of his true job, Negishi must cope with DMC's rising fame while keeping it a secret from friends and family. While performing as Krauser, Negishi proves to be a skilled guitarist, able to play just with his teeth.
mediaTitles: Detroit Metal City: Birth of the Metal Devil
searchTerms: ヨハネ・クラウザーII世
